title: dioscorea subcalva var. subcalva
intro: Dioscorea subcalva var. subcalva, also known as the 'Mountain Yam' or 'Wild Yam', is a type of perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant contains diosgenin, a steroid saponin that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Dioscorea subcalva var. subcalva include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hormone-balancing effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as relieving menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and stress. Dioscorea subcalva var. subcalva can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
